treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Placement of duodenal stent to relieve obstruction
treatment_information.treatment_response: Improvement in discomfort after fluid removal and placement of stent

treatment_information.specific_treatment: Protonix, Morphine, Tylenol, Zofran, IV fluids, heparin drip
treatment_information.treatment_response: Assisted in managing symptoms of pain and nausea

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with vomiting and epigastric pain
EGD performed, malignant stenosis found in duodenum and duodenal stent placed
Started heparin drip for pulmonary embolism
Patient advised to eat a soft diet to prevent future obstruction

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with Dr. ___ as scheduled
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient advised to stay well-hydrated and eat soft foods
